subject: v_regfile_xfer.hpp + unit tests (PB transport)
description: Step 3 (structural): new src/hybrid/v_regfile_xfer.hpp providing write_all(state, bus, mem) / read_all(state, bus, mem) using DM Program Buffer + scratch RAM at HYBRID_V_SCRATCH_GPA. Unit test with RecordingBus asserts the PB sequence shape (vsetvli + vle8.v / vse8.v + ebreak per V reg).
